meta.title: Did Ukraine just take out one of Russia's stealth fighters?
meta.description:
Over the weekend, reports broke of a Ukrainian drone strike that may have taken out one of Russia's exceedingly rare Su-57 Felons — the nation's newest and most advanced fighters. 

Let's talk about what we know, and what this means for the conflict.
